pageContext.name: Banjo-Kazooie
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Premium DNA Toys are proud to present the Banjo-Kazooie 2-Pack.  Gruntilda the witch has captured the beautiful Tooty, and only Banjo and Kazooie can save the day! Recreate your favorite adventures from Spiral Mountain, or create your own with the new Banjo Kazooie action figure 2-pack!  Banjo stands 7.5' tall and features 28 points of articulation for dynamic posing. He includes his banjo, interchangeable heads (smiling and mouth-closed) and banjo-playing hands, and a removable backpack.  Kazooie features 10 points of articulation and a whopping 12' wing span. She includes her trusty kazoo and separates at the waist to fit snugly in Banjo's backpack.  The duo stands nearly 10.5' from Banjo's feet to Kazooie's head feathers when combined.
